payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped close-up of a dark reddish-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a raised rectangular panel and narrow molding; glossy finish with visible wood grain and minor surface wear, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
